suite.name: Tc03-4
suite.source: C:\SE\Sprint2\Test\Test Code\TS002_Report a new incident without filling information\tc03-4.robot

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

test.name: TC03 Submit Report With Missing Required Fields

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: รายงานของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Fill Form With Missing Required Fields
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.msg: Sending C:\SE\Sprint2\Test\Test Code\TS002_Report a new incident without filling information\test.jpg to browser.
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'ส่งรายงาน')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: กรุณากรอกข้อมูลให้ครบทุกช่อง
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: รายงานของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select)[1]' by index 1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select)[2]' by label ความปลอดภัย.
kw.arg: ความปลอดภัย
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=(//select)[3]' by label คนขับมีพฤติกรรมไม่เหมาะสม.
kw.arg: คนขับมีพฤติกรรมไม่เหมาะสม
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'คนขับ ขับรถหวาดเสียวและตะโกนด่ารถคันอื่นๆ ตลอด' into text field 'xpath=//textarea[contains(@placeholder,'อธิบาย')]'.
kw.arg: คนขับ ขับรถหวาดเสียวและตะโกนด่ารถคันอื่นๆ ตลอด
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Choose File
kw.msg: Sending C:\SE\Sprint2\Test\Test Code\TS002_Report a new incident without filling information\test.txt to browser.
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.msg: ${message} = อนุญาตเฉพาะรูปภาพและวิดีโอเท่านั้น
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: รูปภาพและวิดีโอ
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
